reason: Verify R1's per-platform configure()-returns-written-set change still respects the configurator contract; no platform was missed.
Verify R3's pruneOrphanManifestKeys does NOT remove manifest entries referenced by pending rename/delete migration items (would break upgrade path).
Defensive-coding standards (try/catch placement, error message tone). R2 homedir guard uses try-catch-permissive — verify it matches house style.
Check that the patch release adds the migration manifest entry per the documented release flow.
Verify R4 tests avoid the documented anti-patterns (no hardcoded counts, no tautological tests, no type checks in TS).
Verify R4 integration tests follow the temp-dir-spawn-real-CLI pattern, with proper cleanup.
Acceptance criteria checklist + reproductions. Check agent confirms every AC item is covered by code+tests.
